context: Tests whether the agent creates the correct two-campaign structure for Amazon Sponsored Products with proper budget split, bid defaults, and keyword match types as specified in the marketplace advertising skill.

checklist.name: Two-campaign structure
checklist.description: Creates two separate campaigns: one with targetingType 'auto' and one with targetingType 'manual'

checklist.name: Auto budget 30%
checklist.description: The auto campaign's dailyBudget is set to 30% of the total (e.g., totalBudget * 0.3 or equivalent fraction)

checklist.name: Manual budget 70%
checklist.description: The manual campaign's dailyBudget is set to 70% of the total (e.g., totalBudget * 0.7 or equivalent fraction)

checklist.name: Auto ad group bid 0.75
checklist.description: The auto campaign's ad group defaultBid is set to 0.75

checklist.name: Manual ad group bid 1.20
checklist.description: The manual campaign's ad group defaultBid is set to 1.20

checklist.name: Exact match keywords
checklist.description: Seed keywords are added to the manual campaign with matchType 'exact' at bid 1.20

checklist.name: Phrase match keywords
checklist.description: Seed keywords are also added to the manual campaign with matchType 'phrase' at bid 0.90

checklist.name: NA region endpoint
checklist.description: Uses the North America endpoint https://advertising-api.amazon.com (not EU or FE endpoints)

checklist.name: Amazon-Advertising-API-ClientId header
checklist.description: API requests include the Amazon-Advertising-API-ClientId header

checklist.name: Amazon-Advertising-API-Scope header
checklist.description: API requests include the Amazon-Advertising-API-Scope header set to the profileId

checklist.name: OAuth2 refresh token auth
checklist.description: Obtains access token from https://api.amazon.com/auth/o2/token using grant_type 'refresh_token'

checklist.name: Negative keywords at launch
checklist.description: Adds campaign-level negative keywords containing at least one of: 'free', 'diy', 'how to'
